title: Plan-making regulations explainer
body: "In February 2025, the government published the response to the consultation on implementation of plan-making reforms set out in the Levelling-up and Regeneration Act 2023 (“The Act”). In line with our commitment to provide a reasonable familiarisation period ahead of the commencement of the new plan-making system early next year, we have prepared this explainer document which describes what we intend to set out in regulations.  "
